visual_description: A man in a dark coat stands with his hands clasped in front of him, a silver ring glinting on his finger. He faces a wavy metal gate, his back to the camera, and then reaches out to grasp a metal bar. The lighting is dim, emphasizing the shadows around his hands and coat.
